title: x-tra springy norwegian salmon wrap
description: a crispy norwegian-inspired salmon dish featuring a delicate dashi extract and wrapped in a crispy lotus leaf wrap for a keto-friendly brunch option.
instructions: pat salmon dry with paper towels and season with kosher salt and black pepper.
heat a skillet over medium heat and add unsalted butter.
add the salmon skin side up to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes.
flip the salmon over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until cooked through.
meanwhile, warm the dashi extract in a small saucepan over low heat.
brush the lotus leaf wraps with avocado oil and place on a baking sheet.
bake the wraps in the oven for 2-3 minutes or until crispy.
to assemble the wrap, place a cooked salmon fillet on the bottom half of the wrap.
brush the top half of the wrap with the warmed dashi extract and place on top of the salmon.
garnish with chopped fresh chives and serve immediately.
